user.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Ollama
user.description: Step 1 of 2 — Configure your local Ollama AI instance

influxdb.title: Smart Heating Advisor — InfluxDB
influxdb.description: Step 2 of 2 — Configure your InfluxDB 2.x connection. Once saved, add rooms using the **➕ Add Room** button on the integration card.

error.ollama_connection_failed: Cannot connect to Ollama or model not found. Check URL and model name.
error.influxdb_connection_failed: Cannot connect to InfluxDB. Check URL, token, org and bucket.

abort.already_configured: Smart Heating Advisor is already configured.

user.title: Add Room — Step 1/5: Room Setup
user.description: Configure room name, temperature sensor, radiator thermostats and override settings.

data_description.fixed_trvs: TRVs that run at a fixed temperature e.g. heated towel rail.
data_description.override_duration_minutes: How long the manual override pauses automation. Only applies when manual override is enabled.

windows.title: Add Room — Step 2/5: Windows & Airing ({room_name})
windows.description: Configure window sensors and airing mode for **{room_name}**. SHA will pause heating when a window is detected open.

data_description.airing_duration: Minimum 00:00:10. How long heating pauses after airing mode is activated.

temperature.title: Add Room — Step 3/5: Temperature Profile ({room_name})
temperature.description: Configure temperature profile and comfort schedules for **{room_name}**.

data_description.default_temp_enabled: SHA maintains this temperature when no schedule is active.
data_description.schedules: Select your schedule helpers above. To create a new schedule helper, [click here]({schedule_helper_url}). Name it to include the target temperature e.g. 'Morning Shower 26C' or 'Day Heating 20C'.

humidity.title: Add Room — Step 4/5: Humidity ({room_name})
humidity.description: SHA monitors humidity to detect shower or cooking activity. When humidity rises significantly above the room baseline SHA maintains heating to bring humidity to a comfortable level. SHA determines the threshold automatically from your room's historical baseline. No manual threshold configuration is needed.

confirm.title: Add Room — Step 5/5: Confirm ({room_name})

error.room_already_exists: A room with this name is already configured in SHA. Use a different name.
error.invalid_airing_duration: Please enter a valid duration in HH:MM:SS format (minimum 00:00:10)

user.title: Vacation Settings
user.description:
Configure vacation mode. SHA will use a reduced heating profile while you are away.

Delete this subentry and recreate to change settings.

data_description.vacation_calendar: When set, SHA activates vacation mode during calendar events automatically. Leave blank to control vacation mode manually via the toggle above.
data_description.vacation_mode: Heating strategy applied while vacation mode is active.

abort.already_configured: Vacation settings are already configured. Click the existing Vacation entry to edit it.

init.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Settings
init.description: Update connection settings. Vacation mode is configured via the **Vacation Settings** button on the integration card.

data_description.debug_logging: Writes detailed logs for entity creation, room discovery, InfluxDB queries, Ollama prompts and responses, and heating rate updates. Disable when not actively debugging.
data_description.influxdb_token: Changes to connection settings (Ollama, InfluxDB, weather entity) will trigger an integration reload.
data_description.ollama_url: Changes to connection settings (Ollama, InfluxDB, weather entity) will trigger an integration reload.
